lhm_health.name: LHM DB Health
lhm_health.description: Database connection status and global stats. Drop this on a dashboard to confirm the backend is live and the pipeline is current.

lhm_composites_latest.name: LHM Composites — Latest
lhm_composites_latest.description: Latest reading for every LHM proprietary composite. Source of truth: lighthouse_indices.

lhm_composite_history.name: LHM Composite — History
lhm_composite_history.description: Historical time series for a single LHM composite. Pick MRI, LFI, LCI, MSI, SPI, etc.

lhm_categories.name: LHM Categories
lhm_categories.description: All data categories in Lighthouse_Master.db with series counts.

lhm_sources.name: LHM Sources
lhm_sources.description: All data sources in Lighthouse_Master.db with series counts.

lhm_series_search.name: LHM Series — Browse
lhm_series_search.description: Browse the 2,500+ series in Lighthouse_Master.db. Filter by category, source, or text search.

lhm_series_chart.name: LHM Series — Time Series
lhm_series_chart.description: Plot any single series from Lighthouse_Master.db.

lhm_latest_tile.name: LHM Series — Latest Values
lhm_latest_tile.description: Latest observation for one or more series. Comma-separate IDs (e.g. UNRATE,DGS10,SPX).

lhm_pillar_heatmap.name: Diagnostic Dozen — Pillar Heatmap
lhm_pillar_heatmap.description: Current z-score for all 12 pillar composites, grouped by engine. Sorted by absolute stress.

lhm_transmission_chain.name: Transmission Chain — Lead/Lag Z-Scores
lhm_transmission_chain.description: Lead/lag normalized z-scores along a predefined transmission chain. Switch chain via the dropdown.

lhm_divergence_pair.name: Divergence — Market vs Real Economy
lhm_divergence_pair.description: Z-score gap between a market-side composite (MSI/SPI/FCI) and a real-economy composite (LFI/GCI/CCI/HCI/BCI). |Δz| above the threshold flags decoupling.

lhm_divergence_grid.name: Divergence — Grid
lhm_divergence_grid.description: Pairwise divergence across the canonical market vs real-economy pairs. Flags rows where |Δz| ≥ threshold.

lhm_mri_history.name: MRI — Master Composite
lhm_mri_history.description: Macro Risk Index. Master composite that drives the regime multiplier and equity allocation.

lhm_pulse_tiles.name: Pulse — Headline Series
lhm_pulse_tiles.description: Anchor reads: MRI driver components (10Y, 2Y, VIX, HY OAS, Mortgage 30Y, RRP).

lhm_breadth_panel.name: Breadth — % > 20d / 50d / 200d MA
lhm_breadth_panel.description: S&P 500 breadth panel. Three-line view of percent of constituents above their 20d, 50d, 200d moving average. Pillar 11 — Structure.

lhm_sentiment_panel.name: Sentiment — AAII Bull / Bear / Spread
lhm_sentiment_panel.description: AAII bullish %, bearish %, and bull-bear spread. Pillar 12 — Sentiment.

lhm_rates_panel.name: Rates — Treasury Curve + Mortgage
lhm_rates_panel.description: 2Y, 5Y, 10Y, 30Y Treasury yields plus 30Y mortgage rate. Pillar 8 — Government / Pillar 4 — Housing transmission.

lhm_credit_panel.name: Credit — HY vs IG OAS
lhm_credit_panel.description: ICE BofA high-yield and investment-grade option-adjusted spreads. Pillar 9 — Financial.

lhm_plumbing_panel.name: Plumbing — RRP / WALCL / TGA / IORB
lhm_plumbing_panel.description: Reserve management + Fed liquidity stack. Pillar 10 — Plumbing.

lhm_engine_summary.name: Engines — Mean |z| Summary
lhm_engine_summary.description: Per-engine summary of pillar composite z-scores. Mean, mean |z|, and max |z| across the pillars in each engine. The fastest read on which engine is doing the work.

lhm_labor_composite.name: Labor — LFI History
lhm_labor_composite.description: Pillar 1 composite (LFI). The Labor read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_prices_composite.name: Prices — PCI History
lhm_prices_composite.description: Pillar 2 composite (PCI). The Prices read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_growth_composite.name: Growth — GCI History
lhm_growth_composite.description: Pillar 3 composite (GCI). The Growth read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_housing_composite.name: Housing — HCI History
lhm_housing_composite.description: Pillar 4 composite (HCI). The Housing read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_consumer_composite.name: Consumer — CCI History
lhm_consumer_composite.description: Pillar 5 composite (CCI). The Consumer read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_business_composite.name: Business — BCI History
lhm_business_composite.description: Pillar 6 composite (BCI). The Business read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_trade_composite.name: Trade — TCI History
lhm_trade_composite.description: Pillar 7 composite (TCI). The Trade read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_government_composite.name: Government — FPI History
lhm_government_composite.description: Pillar 8 composite (FPI). The Government read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_financial_composite.name: Financial — FCI History
lhm_financial_composite.description: Pillar 9 composite (FCI). The Financial read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_plumbing_composite.name: Plumbing — LCI History
lhm_plumbing_composite.description: Pillar 10 composite (LCI). The Plumbing read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_structure_composite.name: Structure — MSI History
lhm_structure_composite.description: Pillar 11 composite (MSI). The Structure read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_sentiment_composite.name: Sentiment — SPI History
lhm_sentiment_composite.description: Pillar 12 composite (SPI). The Sentiment read over full history, source of truth lighthouse_indices.

lhm_eq_indices.name: Equities — Index Map (rebased)
lhm_eq_indices.description: SPY / QQQ / IWM / EFA / EEM rebased to 100. Large vs tech vs small vs intl vs EM.

lhm_eq_sectors.name: Equities — Sector Rotation (rebased)
lhm_eq_sectors.description: GICS sector ETFs rebased to 100. Relative leadership across the eleven sectors.

lhm_eq_tiles.name: Equities — Tape & Internals
lhm_eq_tiles.description: S&P level, VIX, % above 200d, RSI, Z-RoC, AAII spread. Pillar 11/12 read.

lhm_eq_sector_tiles.name: Equities — Sector Levels
lhm_eq_sector_tiles.description: Latest close for each GICS sector ETF.

lhm_rates_real.name: Rates — Real Yield & Breakeven
lhm_rates_real.description: 10Y TIPS real yield and 10Y breakeven inflation.

lhm_rates_tiles.name: Rates — Curve & Policy
lhm_rates_tiles.description: Curve anchors, spreads, real yield, breakeven, mortgage, SOFR, EFFR.

lhm_treasury_auctions.name: Rates — Treasury Auction Quality
lhm_treasury_auctions.description: 10Y tail, bid-to-cover, indirect share, bills share, weighted-avg maturity.

lhm_credit_etfs.name: Credit — HY vs IG ETFs (rebased)
lhm_credit_etfs.description: HYG and LQD rebased to 100. Price-return proxy for high-yield vs investment-grade.

lhm_clg_history.name: Credit — Credit-Labor Gap (CLG)
lhm_clg_history.description: CLG composite over history. Spreads vs labor fragility. <-1.0 = spreads ignoring labor.

lhm_credit_tiles.name: Credit — Spreads & ETFs
lhm_credit_tiles.description: HY OAS, IG OAS, and the HYG / LQD closes.

lhm_fx_dollar.name: Currencies — Dollar Indices
lhm_fx_dollar.description: Trade-weighted broad dollar and advanced-foreign-economies dollar.

lhm_fx_majors.name: Currencies — Majors (rebased)
lhm_fx_majors.description: EUR, GBP, JPY, CAD, CNY vs USD rebased to 100. Quote conventions vary; read moves, not levels.

lhm_fx_tiles.name: Currencies — Spot Board
lhm_fx_tiles.description: Broad dollar plus the major USD pairs.

lhm_cmdty_energy.name: Commodities — Energy
lhm_cmdty_energy.description: WTI and Brent crude, dollars per barrel.

lhm_cmdty_metals.name: Commodities — Metals (rebased)
lhm_cmdty_metals.description: Gold, silver, and gold miners rebased to 100.

lhm_cmdty_vol.name: Commodities — Implied Vol
lhm_cmdty_vol.description: CBOE gold (GVZ) and crude oil (OVX) volatility indices.

lhm_cmdty_tiles.name: Commodities — Board
lhm_cmdty_tiles.description: WTI, Brent, gold, silver, copper, retail gasoline.

lhm_crypto_majors.name: Crypto — Majors (rebased)
lhm_crypto_majors.description: BTC, ETH, SOL rebased to 100. Relative performance across the majors.

lhm_crypto_cdli.name: Crypto — DeFi Liquidity (CDLI)
lhm_crypto_cdli.description: Crypto DeFi Liquidity composite. Free-data on-chain liquidity read.

lhm_crypto_sli.name: Crypto — Stablecoin Liquidity (SLI)
lhm_crypto_sli.description: Stablecoin Liquidity Impulse. Dollar liquidity entering / leaving the chain.

lhm_crypto_tiles.name: Crypto — Majors Board
lhm_crypto_tiles.description: BTC / ETH / SOL price and BTC / ETH market cap.

lhm_risk_model.name: Risk — Ensemble Output
lhm_risk_model.description: Recession probability, ensemble risk, warning level, allocation multiplier, liquidity stage.

lhm_recprob_history.name: Risk — Recession Probability
lhm_recprob_history.description: REC_PROB over history. 6-12 month forward recession odds from the ensemble.

lhm_ms_regime.name: Main Street — Regime Verdict
lhm_ms_regime.description: The one-glance operator read. Regime state plus the headline checklist.

lhm_ms_spending.name: Main Street — Spending Pulse
lhm_ms_spending.description: Real PCE YoY vs real retail sales YoY. Is the customer still showing up?

lhm_ms_wage_price.name: Main Street — Wage-Price Squeeze
lhm_ms_wage_price.description: Service-sector wages vs CPI. The gap is real purchasing power.

lhm_ms_rent.name: Main Street — Rent Stress
lhm_ms_rent.description: Zillow market rents lead CPI shelter 9-12 months. What lease renewals will price.

lhm_ms_credit.name: Main Street — Customer Balance Sheet
lhm_ms_credit.description: Credit-card delinquency vs personal saving rate. Borrowing or cushioning?

lhm_ms_jobs.name: Main Street — Jobs
lhm_ms_jobs.description: Retail trade and leisure/hospitality payroll growth. Main Street's employment pulse.

lhm_ms_quits.name: Main Street — Quit Signal
lhm_ms_quits.description: JOLTS quits for retail and hospitality. Confidence to walk away = labor power.

lhm_ms_scorecard.name: Main Street — Scorecard
lhm_ms_scorecard.description: Eight headline operator reads, latest value and direction.

lhm_cost_ppi.name: Cost — Producer Prices YoY
lhm_cost_ppi.description: PPI final demand, intermediate processed goods, all commodities. Input-cost pressure.

lhm_cost_energy.name: Cost — Energy & Materials (rebased)
lhm_cost_energy.description: WTI crude, retail gasoline, copper, softwood lumber rebased to 100.

lhm_cost_wages.name: Cost — Employment Cost Index YoY
lhm_cost_wages.description: ECI wages & salaries and total compensation, year-over-year (quarterly).

lhm_cost_freight.name: Cost — Freight (Truck Tonnage)
lhm_cost_freight.description: ATA truck tonnage index. Goods actually moving through the economy.

lhm_cost_tiles.name: Cost — Input Board
lhm_cost_tiles.description: Producer prices, energy, materials, freight, employment cost.

lhm_hire_flows.name: Hiring — Labor Flows (rates)
lhm_hire_flows.description: JOLTS quits rate and hires rate, total nonfarm. Can you keep and find people?

lhm_hire_financing.name: Hiring — Financing Cost
lhm_hire_financing.description: Bank prime rate, 30Y mortgage, 10Y Treasury. The cost of a dollar of capital.

lhm_hire_sloos.name: Hiring — Lending Standards (SLOOS)
lhm_hire_sloos.description: Net % of banks tightening C&I loans (all firms, small firms) and loan demand.

lhm_hire_bizcredit.name: Hiring — Business Credit YoY
lhm_hire_bizcredit.description: Commercial & industrial loan growth, year-over-year. Is credit actually flowing?

lhm_hire_tiles.name: Hiring — Labor & Credit Board
lhm_hire_tiles.description: Openings, quits, hires, layoffs, prime rate, tightening, delinquency, loan growth.
